title: Mushroom Stuffed Portobellos
description: A hearty and flavorful vegetarian main dish featuring portobello mushrooms stuffed with a mixture of sautéed mushrooms, pilaf, and spices.

ingredients.name: Optional: feta cheese, chopped fresh parsley

instructions: Clean and prepare the portobello mushrooms by removing the stems and gills.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Sauté the xenial mushrooms and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine.
Stuff each portobello mushroom cap with the pilaf mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Place the stuffed mushrooms on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Garnish with feta cheese and chopped parsley, if desired.
